Document:
[color=#ffff00][head=3]Section 5: Naming Rules[/head][/color]
[color=#a4885c]5.1[/color] In-character names must not make obvious references or be a play on words, and must not be obscene. ★
[color=#a4885c]5.2[/color] Do not attempt to impersonate another character without their OOC consent. [color=#f1c232]★★[/color]
[color=#a4885c]5.3[/color] Ship names, especially Command ships, must be of a reasonable standard for an MRP server. For example, do not name a ship "Goober" or "MeowMeowMeow". ★
[color=#a4885c]5.4[/color] Do not include Job Titles in your characters name as a way to leverage an advantage. E.g. EMT or Jr. Enf. ★
